validated: no-change replay idempotency for all three advanced write modes
run and lineage evidence writes for all successful smoke runs

follow_up_evidence.summary: A later hash_diff_upsert smoke validated changed-row replay, no-change replay after change, null merge-key preflight failure and duplicate merge-key preflight failure.

verification_commands.name: hashdiff_first_run
verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=.;src;adapters/gcp/src uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli smoke .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/hashdiff.ingestion.yaml --environment .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/env.yaml --execute --runtime bq --allow-review-required --report .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/hashdiff-report.json

verification_commands.name: historical_first_run
verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=.;src;adapters/gcp/src uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli smoke .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/historical.ingestion.yaml --environment .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/env.yaml --execute --runtime bq --allow-review-required --report .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/historical-report.json

verification_commands.name: snapshot_first_run
verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=.;src;adapters/gcp/src uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli smoke .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/snapshot.ingestion.yaml --environment .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/env.yaml --execute --runtime bq --allow-review-required --report .tmp/gcp-bq-12a/snapshot-report.json

decision: GCP-BQ-12A is closed for compact opt-in BigQuery replay/idempotency evidence. GCP-BQ-12C1 later closed hash_diff_upsert changed-row and source-key preflight evidence, GCP-BQ-12C2 closed compact historical delete-expression and late-arriving reject evidence, and GCP-BQ-12C3 closed compact snapshot complete-source reactivation/tombstone evidence. GCP-BQ-12C now accepts hash_diff_upsert cross-adapter production parity; historical and snapshot production parity remains future work.
